name: QA 990
description:
PCP QA Test No. 990

MMV format error injection and verification of pmdammv response.



Copyright (c) 2016 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu1804-i386-container reproduce

PCP QA Test No. 990

MMV format error injection and verification of pmdammv response.

Copyright (c) 2016 Red Hat.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu1804-i386-container reproduce
